title: Senior Teacher - StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies!
